what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment of type board_items that points to a specific board item via a board:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
No code symbols or executable content
concerns: File contains only a reference; no attached content or context
Target board item is not described locally
No indication of why this attachment exists
notes: A bare metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel memory attachment to board item item-939d7822.
questions: What content or decision does board://item-939d7822 represent?

intention_signals: To create a typed, timestamped association between a channel memory artifact and a board item for later lookup or traceability.
contribution: Provides a structured, typed cross-reference between a channel memory attachment and a board item, including an exact timestamp and URI target.
